# CWE-91 positive: XML document assembled from user fields
lang: go
file: CWE-91-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/xml"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-91 XML Injection
// Vulnerable line: user title concatenated into XML payload.
func ImportProfile(c *gin.Context) {
	title := c.PostForm("title")
	body := c.PostForm("body")
	doc := fmt.Sprintf("<profile><title>%s</title><body>%s</body></profile>", title, body)
	var parsed struct {
		Title string `xml:"title"`
		Body  string `xml:"body"`
	}
	if err := xml.Unmarshal([]byte(doc), &parsed); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "xml"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"title": parsed.Title})
}
